message:
fix(obligation): Lyapunov governor precision + f64 comparison safety

- Add #[allow(clippy::cast_precision_loss)] with comment explaining that
  potential function is heuristic and precision loss is acceptable for
  large nanosecond ages
- Reorder test setup: compute v1 before constructing high-pressure
  snapshot to avoid unnecessary clone
- Replace direct f64 equality comparisons with epsilon-based
  (w.w_tasks - w.w_obligation_age).abs() < f64::EPSILON for the
  uniform weights test — floating-point equality is never reliable

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
